# WidgeTDC Architecture Hydration — 2026-04-09

**Generated by:** cowork-hyperagent  
**Scope:** RLM Engine · Orchestrator · WidgeTDC Backend · Contracts  
**Commit baseline:** `f21a678` (orchestrator) · `79dd87b` (rlm) · `6d93e2a` (backend) · `619d1e9` (contracts)

---

## 1. RLM Engine — Intelligence Refactor

### 1.1 `intelligence/` → 11 Domain Subdirectories

Commit `9084aac` — 138 filer fra flad rod splittet til domænebaseret struktur.  
256 filer opdateret. 648 unit tests passerer.

```
src/intelligence/
  agents/       (10)  Orchestration, chains, swarms, signaling
  artifacts/    (14)  Foundry, building blocks, harvest pipeline
  automation/   (5)   Schedulers, autonomy execution
  consulting/   (20)  LegoFactory, domain analysis, document gen
  graph/        (18)  Knowledge persistence, Neo4j alignment
  harvesting/   (21)  Source harvesters, OSINT, watchlists
  infra/        (12)  Event bus, tracing, caching, write buffer
  ml/           (11)  RAG, Q-learning, NeuMF, LLM routing
  monitoring/   (13)  Probes, drift, recovery, compliance
  reasoning/    (6)   Cognitive middleware, thinking tools
  surfaces/     (8)   Surface runtimes, benchmarks
  scoring/      (4)   Unchanged
  templates/    (21)  Unchanged
```

**Backward compatibility:** `__init__.py` re-exports bevaret — eksisterende imports virker.

### 1.2 Kritiske Fixes

| Commit | Fix | Impact |
|--------|-----|--------|
| `b4c0e48` | Cortex recall paralleliseret via `asyncio.gather` — LIN-675/676 | Serial 3×500ms → concurrent, timeout 4s→8s |
| `79dd87b` | Cortex `_verify_memory_written` false negatives — manglende `WHERE validUntil IS NULL` | Memory writes rapporterede "not verified" fejlagtigt |
| `79dd87b` | Gemini-flash 404 fix — router returnerede `deepseek-chat` som model til Google API | Nu: `gemini-2.0-flash` via provider-filter |
| `401a5bd` | `strategy=llm` fold path — `LlmMatrix.resolve("fold_context")` → gemini-2.0-flash | LLM-baseret folding med graceful fallback |
| `71f5a0b` | Claude-sonnet fallback erstattet med `qwen3-235b-a22b` | Reducerer Anthropic API dependency |
| `20226f0` | Boot path crash efter `intelligence/` refactor — `parents[2]→[3]` fix | |
| `43d7c51` | P0 server errors 6-12: `/execute`, `/pdr/execute`, `/ooda/run`, `/operations/*` | |
| `f216b68` | P0 server errors 1-5 | |
| `3428f3f` | Semaphore acquire timeout separeret fra processing timeout i `/reason` | |

## 2. WidgeTDC Backend — Domain-Baseret Refaktor

### 2.1 Ny `src/` Struktur

Commit `7ca93b97` — `services/` omorganiseret til domain-baseret hierarki.

```
apps/backend/src/
  adapters/        Agent, Neo4j, LLM adapters
  agents/          Agent coordination layer
  api/             REST API definitions
  bootstrap/       routes.ts, app init, middleware
  config/          logger, env, constants
  connectors/      External service connectors
  controllers/     Request handlers
  cron/            Scheduled jobs
  database/        DB pool, migrations
  domain/          Domain model layer (model/)
  engram/          Memory + knowledge engram
  framework/       DI container, base classes
  harvest/         Data ingestion pipeline
  integrations/    Third-party integrations
  jobs/            Background job runners
  lib/             Shared utilities
  mcp/             MCP tool registry + handlers
  memory/          Agent memory layer
  middleware/      Auth, rate-limit, trace-id
  openapi/         Schema definitions
  orchestrator/    Orchestration coordination
  platform/        Platform services
  protocols/       A2A, gRPC protocols
  rlm/             RLM Engine client
  routes/          Express route modules
  self-healing/    SelfHealingAdapter
  services/        Domain services
  tools/           Tool executors
  types/           Shared TypeScript types
  utils/           Helpers
```

### 2.2 MCP Layer Intern Struktur

```
mcp/
  executor/
    AuditLogger.ts       Audit trail per tool call
    EnforcedExecutor.ts  Policy enforcement wrapper
    SecurityPolicy.ts    ACL + security gate
  cognitive/
    agents/              Agent-specific handlers
    autonomous/          Autonomous task routing
    gateway/             MCP gateway proxy
  prometheus/            toolHandlers_PROMETHEUS.ts
  tools/
    toolHandlers_GIT.ts
    toolHandlers_RAILWAY.ts
    toolHandlers_RLM.ts
    toolHandlers_SYSTEM.ts
    toolHandlers_OCTOPUS.ts
  mcpRegistry.ts         Tool registration
  mcpRouter.ts           Routing table
  SmartToolRouter.ts     Q-learning tool selection
  AutoRegistrar.ts       Auto-discovery + registration
  EventBus.ts            Internal event pub/sub
```

### 2.3 Kritiske Fixes og Features

| Commit | Ændring | Impact |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `8b3bf1e` | `/api/kpi/ingest` + `/api/kpi/latest` registreret | Fixer 404×12 fra orchestrator cron |
| `70547088` | Hook JSON corruption + credential leak gate + index.ts double-wrap | P0 sikkerhedsfix |
| `405c6662` | `createLogger()` factory — single-line Railway format | Stopper log rate-limit hits |
| `ae0da49c` | `CypherInt` branded type + `coerceParams` | Sikrer Neo4j integer coercion, ingen JS float-to-neo4j fejl |
| `35f37150` | trace_id log injection + burn-rate SLO alerts + Cypher lint guard | Observability |
| `84332068` | Hardcodede credential fallbacks fjernet — fail closed | Sikkerhed |
| `28922334` | Grafana SLO panel threshold + colorMode fixes | Dashboard |
| `b1ac6e40` | `ui.drill_explorer` — Obsidian-style hierarchical graph drill-down | Ny UI tool |
| `e62b4f13` | Intelligence-stack hard gate + contracts CI + CMA ADR | Governance |

### 2.4 `/api/kpi` — Ny Endpoint

```typescript
POST /api/kpi/ingest
Body: { source: string, metrics: Record<string, unknown>, label?, timestamp?, tags? }
Response: { success: true, id: string, node: KpiSnapshot }

GET /api/kpi/latest
Response: { success: true, data: KpiSnapshot[], count: number }
```

KpiSnapshot MERGE til Neo4j keyed på `(source, timestamp)`.

### 3.3 HyperAgent Layer (LIN-626/627/628 — Done)

`src/hyperagent/hyperagent.ts`:
- `createPlan()` — goal → ChainDefinition via RLM cognitive proxy + `selectChainMode()` (DR15)
- `approvePlan()` / `rejectPlan()` — Redis-backed, per-profile TTL (900s prod_write, 3600s staged)
- `executePlan()` — approval gate → `executeChain()` → Neo4j trace
- `evaluatePlan()` — KpiSnapshot → Neo4j parameterized Cypher
- Session circuit breaker: auto-downgrade read_only after 3 failures, circuit open after 5
- 3 policy profiles: `read_only`, `staged_write`, `production_write`

### 3.4 AGENT_BOOT_PROTOCOL.md (Ny)

Kanonisk boot-sekvens for alle agenter (Claude/Gemini/Codex/Qwen/DeepSeek):
1. Service health check (backend + orchestrator + rlm)
2. Lesson check + acknowledge (`audit.lessons` → `audit.acknowledge`)
3. A2A presence signal (Neo4j `AgentMemory` heartbeat)
4. Linear hygiene (In Progress scan + backlog rot check)
5. Read active backlog item og start

---

## 4. Contracts — v0.4.3

### 4.1 WIRE_FORMAT.md (Ny)

**Regel 1: `$id` påkrævet i alle cross-service payloads**
```json
{ "$id": "CognitiveRequest", "task": "...", "reasoning_mode": "deep" }
```
Enforced af `InsightIntegrityGuard` + CI gate (blokkerer på manglende `$id`).

**Regel 2: snake_case på wire**
```json
{ "reasoning_trace": [...], "confidence_score": 0.87, "domain_id": "strategy_corp" }
```
camelCase = CONTRACT_VIOLATION (silent data loss ved Python deserialisering).

### 4.2 Orchestrator Impact

Orchestrator bruger `file:../widgetdc-contracts` → v0.4.3 automatisk aktiv.  
`src/mcp-caller.ts` og `src/hyperagent/hyperagent.ts` bør verificeres for `$id` compliance.
